📁 Tournament Template Documents

Upload Word, PDF, Excel templates for admin use — Memo's, schedules, rulebooks, contact sheets and so on. Documents are stored on this device and are never affected by Master Reset.

PDF, Word (.doc/.docx), Excel (.xlsx) supported  ·  Multiple files allowed  ·  Max 4MB per file

📋 Build Tournament Roster

Add players using any of the methods below. Once your roster is complete, click 👥 Build Teams to create and balance your teams.

✏️ Option 1 — Add Player Manually

📥 Option 2 — Import from PDF or Excel

Upload a PDF roster or import from an Excel/CSV worksheet. Use the template below to ensure clean imports.

📋 PDF Format Guide & Template
Share this with anyone building the roster. It shows the exact 5-column format (Name · Age · Skill · Email · Position) that imports cleanly with no errors.
⬇ Download Template

📄 Import from PDF

Upload a PDF roster matching the template format above.

📊 Import from Excel / CSV Worksheet

Upload an .xlsx or .csv file with columns: Name · Age · Skill · Email · Position.

📋 Preview — 0 entries found

Review and edit before importing. Uncheck any you want to skip.

📲 Option 3 — Pre-Tournament Sign-Up Form

🔴 Sign-Up Form — Not published
The sign-up form is hidden from players. Click the button to publish it on the public page.
📋 Pre-Registration List
Players who sign up via the public page appear below. Review them, then import to the roster individually or all at once.
📭

No sign-ups yet. Publish the form above to start collecting registrations!

Name Phone Age Skill Level Position Email Signed Up Status Action
Jane Sample EXAMPLE 902-555-0100 34 ⭐ 3.0 Forward [email protected] 3/25/2026, 9:00:00 AM ⏳ Pending
Adds every player from the sign-up list directly into the Tournament Roster (Players tab). Duplicate names are skipped automatically. ⚠️ Permanently deletes every sign-up entry from the registration list. This does not affect players already imported to the roster. Cannot be undone.

✅ Roster complete? Next step →

👥 Build Teams

Choose how you'd like to build your teams and schedule:

🔄

Option 1 — Single Round Robin

Auto-balance players onto teams. Every team plays every other team once. Schedule is generated automatically.

✓
🔁

Option 2 — Double Round Robin

Auto-balance players onto teams. Every team plays every other team twice. Schedule is generated automatically.

✓
✍️

Option 3 — Manually Build Teams

Manually drag and assign players to teams. You'll build the schedule separately in the next step.

✓

Select an option above to get started.

🏁 Post Tournament Tasks

Archive records, send thank-you emails to all participants, and perform a full reset when you are ready to start fresh.

🗄️ Archive Tournament Records

Saves a permanent snapshot of the Roster, Team Summary and Player Stats to your device as a PDF report. The live data is not affected.

✉️ Send Thank You Emails

Compose a thank-you message for all participants. Clicking Send opens your email client with all addresses pre-filled. You can review and edit before sending.

📬 Recipients

✉️ Send to Individual

Enter a single email address to open a pre-filled email addressed directly to that recipient.

⚠️ Only participants who provided an email address will receive the message. Opens your default email client.

🔄 Master Reset

⚠️ Warning — This action is permanent and cannot be undone

Master Reset wipes all tournament data from both this device and the cloud database — Roster, Teams, Schedule, Game Results, Player Stats, Standings, Announcements, Sign-Ups, Gallery and Settings. The Pre-Tournament Task List is permanently preserved and will not be affected. Archive your records first before proceeding.
